summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Let's Snog (London dating app). All 25 backend tests pass (public endpoints, auth surface, 401 gating, full auth flow with admin user, photo upload via Emergent Object Storage, mutual-match->date plan->safety token->feedback gate). Frontend: landing renders with correct headline+CTA, unauth redirects from /matches /events /chats /profile back to /, onboarding redirect works when onboarding_complete=false, all 4 form testids render (onb-name/age/bio/step1-next/photo-upload/quiz-submit), bottom-nav with all 4 tab testids visible after auth, events list+signup buttons render, admin form renders, /safety/<bad-token> public route renders error message, /manifest.json valid PWA manifest.

issues: The platform 'Made with Emergent' badge sits in the bottom-right and visually overlaps the right-most nav tab (You/Profile) on small viewports (390px). Tabs are still clickable via testid and route works, but the label/icon for nav-profile-tab is partially obscured under the badge. Consider adding bottom safe-area padding (pb-20) on mobile so the badge clears the nav, or ensuring the nav z-index renders above the badge.

action_items: (Minor / cosmetic) Consider increasing bottom padding on authenticated pages so the Emergent platform badge does not visually overlap the right-most bottom-nav tab on 390px mobile viewports.
Document admin bootstrap clearly for users: first registered user becomes admin via auth/session (already implemented). Consider exposing a one-time CLI/seed for ops.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1165 lines – consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/matches.py, routers/events.py, routers/chats.py, routers/admin.py for maintainability.

auth_me re-implements get_current_user via parameter passthrough; cleaner to use Depends(get_current_user) consistently across all auth-gated endpoints (currently every endpoint repeats the cookie/header parameters).

compatibility_score returns 0.0 quiz overlap when len mismatch; current onboarding gate guarantees 8 answers, but daily_matches pool already filters onboarding_complete=True so this is fine. Acceptable.

_resolve_event_matches uses event['round_decisions'] dict keys with f-string format; relies on dotted-key Mongo updates (`round_decisions.{r}:{a}:{b}`) – dot in key value is fine since the key is the substring after the dot, but values containing colons are OK. Verified working.
WebSocket auth uses session_token via query param ?token= which can leak in logs/referrers. Consider sub-protocol or first-message auth in a future iteration.
auth/session sets cookie with samesite=None secure=True – correct for cross-site preview, OK.
Photo upload accepts up to 8MB, correct extension allowlist, exclude `_id` properly. OK.
Safety endpoint returns first name + first photo only – good privacy posture.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (landing, redirects, onboarding redirect+form, bottom-nav, events list, admin form, safety public, manifest)

test_credentials: No real Emergent Google auth credentials used. Tests seed test users + sessions directly in MongoDB via mongosh/pymongo (TEST_ prefix, TESTTOK_ session tokens) and authenticate via Authorization: Bearer <token> header (the get_current_user dependency accepts both cookie and Bearer).
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates two users TEST_user_A* (admin) and TEST_user_B* with 8-answer quiz, photos, onboarding_complete=True. Cleanup fixture removes all TEST_ users + sessions + matches + swipes + daily_sets + messages + date_plans after the session. Frontend playwright used a separate TEST_user_PLAY admin user, also cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_letssnog.py + conftest.py is reusable as regression tests. To run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_letssnog.py -v. Tests authenticate via Authorization: Bearer <session_token> header. Cleanup is automatic via session-scoped autouse fixture. Frontend testing requires injecting a session_token cookie via Playwright context.add_cookies (the cookie is httpOnly, secure, samesite=None). All bottom-nav tabs use testids nav-{matches|events|chats|profile}-tab. Onboarding has 3 steps gated by data-testid='onb-step1-next', 'onb-step2-next', 'onb-quiz-submit'.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. All backend endpoints behave per spec; all frontend flows render and route correctly. The only finding is a cosmetic overlap of the platform's 'Made with Emergent' preview badge with the right-most bottom-nav tab on narrow viewports — this is purely visual and does not block functionality.
